title: Privacy Policy: Data Protection & Cookie Usage | HouseCar 2026
description: HouseCar privacy policy - Learn how we collect, use, and protect your personal data, including Google AdSense cookies, tracking technologies, and data security practices.
content:
Privacy Policy

Effective Date: April 29, 2026

housecar.life ('we', 'our', or 'us') is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

Automatically Collected Data

When you visit our website, we automatically collect:

  • Browser type and version
  • Operating system
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website
  • IP address (anonymized where possible)
  • Device type (mobile, desktop, tablet)

Cookies and Tracking Technologies

We use cookies and similar technologies to:

  • Remember your preferences
  • Analyze website traffic
  • Improve user experience
  • Deliver personalized content

Google AdSense Cookies

We use Google AdSense to display advertisements. Google may use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to our website or other websites. Google's use of advertising cookies enables it and its partners to serve ads based on your visit to our site and/or other sites on the Internet.

You can opt out of personalized advertising by visiting Google's Ads Settings or using the NAI Consumer Opt Out page.

How We Use Your Information

We use collected data for:

  • Providing and improving our services
  • Analyzing website performance
  • Understanding user preferences
  • Displaying relevant advertisements
  • Ensuring website security

Third-Party Services

Google AdSense

We use Google AdSense, a service for including advertisements from Google. Google AdSense uses cookies to:

  • Serve ads based on user interests
  • Limit the number of times you see an ad
  • Measure ad effectiveness
  • Report website traffic statistics

For more information about Google's privacy practices, visit: Google Privacy Policy

Analytics

We may use analytics services to understand website usage. These services may collect anonymous data about your visits.

Data Security

We implement appropriate security measures including:

  • HTTPS encryption for all data transmission
  • Regular security audits
  • Access controls on data systems
  • Secure data storage practices

Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have rights including:

  • Accessing your personal data
  • Requesting data deletion
  • Opting out of marketing communications
  • Controlling cookie preferences

Children's Privacy

Our website is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.

Policy Updates

We may update this privacy policy periodically. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated 'Effective Date'.

Contact Us

For privacy-related questions or concerns, contact us through our website.

Last Updated: April 2026
author: HouseCar Legal Team
